appstream.fleet.domainjoininfo.CfnAbout: The name of the directory and organizational unit (OU) to use to join a fleet to a Microsoft Active Directory domain.

appstream.fleet.domainjoininfo.Directory.Description: The fully qualified name of the directory (for example, corp.example.com).

appstream.fleet.domainjoininfo.Organizat.Description: The distinguished name of the organizational unit for computer accounts.
